code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut i = 0
  mut have = false
  mut max_v = 0
  mut min_v = 0
  mut in_tok = false
  mut tok_start = 0
  while i <= n
    mut is_ws = true
    if i < n
      match string.byte_at(input, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
          is_ws = true
        else
          is_ws = false
        end
      when None
        is_ws = true
      end
    else
      is_ws = true
    end
    if is_ws
      if in_tok
        let tok = string.substring(input, tok_start, i)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          if not have
            max_v = v
            min_v = v
            have = true
          else
            if v > max_v
              max_v = v
            end
            if v < min_v
              min_v = v
            end
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        in_tok = false
      end
    else
      if not in_tok
        in_tok = true
        tok_start = i
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not have
    Err("no input")
  else
    print("max=#{max_v}")
    print("min=#{min_v}")
    Ok(())
  end
end
